correlation_clusters.name: trend_direction
correlation_clusters.note: 9-member mega-cluster. 100% agreement when co-active. Leader gets 1.0x, 8 followers get 0.12x each.

correlation_clusters.name: macro_external
correlation_clusters.note: 6-member cluster of macro/sentiment signals. 100% agreement observed.

correlation_clusters.name: pattern_based
correlation_clusters.note: Price pattern recognition. r=0.708 on BTC.

regime_performance.note: Massive divergence between 1d and 3h accuracy. Many signals that fail at 1d excel at 3h in ranging markets. System correctly boosts 3h performers via HORIZON_SIGNAL_WEIGHTS.

recommendations.title: Signal persistence filter
recommendations.description: Require signals to maintain their vote for 2+ consecutive cycles before counting. Eliminates single-cycle noise flips. Addresses documented pattern: 'single-check MACD/RSI improvements are noise'.

recommendations.title: Update trend_direction cluster penalty math
recommendations.description: Comment says 7 followers at 0.12x=1.84x but there are 8 followers (macd added). Actual effective=1.96x. Could tighten to 0.10x for 1.80x target.

recommendations.title: Improve regime detection coverage
recommendations.description: Current regime detector uses simple EMA9/EMA21 gap + RSI. Adding ADX > 25 for trending confirmation and Bollinger Band width for volatility detection would improve classification accuracy.
recommendations.impact: high (regime-specific weighting only helps when regime is correctly identified)

recommendations.title: Per-ticker IC weights activation
recommendations.description: Infrastructure exists (compute_signal_ic_per_ticker) but not applied in consensus. Would catch ticker-specific phantom performers.

recommendations.title: Metals forecast model review
recommendations.description: LLM XAG 3h at 42%, Chronos XAG 3h at 42.8-43.3%. These are actively harmful and should be gated. Verify they are being caught by accuracy gate.
